overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a dirt trail through a scenic wilderness area with a river, rocky cliffs, and pine forests. The character encounters a horseback rider while exploring the natural landscape under bright daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside wilderness trail approaching rocky cliff formation

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the dirt trail with a river visible to the left and rocky cliffs ahead

entered.detail: calm river running parallel to the trail on the left side
worn dirt path with grass growing between wheel ruts
tall rocky cliff face with layered stone formations
dense forest of pine trees covering the distant hills
tall green grass and wildflowers on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through open wilderness with a river to the left and a large rock cliff formation approaching on the left. The landscape features grassy meadows, scattered boulders, and distant pine forests under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail alongside river with scattered trees

events.description: passing the large rock cliff formation, landscape opens to wider grassland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as it curves gently through open grassland

entered.detail: large grey boulders scattered across the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: Having passed the cliff formation, the trail continues through expansive grassland with the river now visible at a distance to the left. The terrain features scattered boulders and pine trees while the path curves gently through the open landscape.

events.description: horseback rider appears ahead on the trail and passes by the character

agents.ego_description: walking toward a horseback rider in the distance and continuing past them into the forested area

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback approaching from ahead on the trail, then passing by

entered.detail: thick cluster of pine trees marking the entrance to denser forest
large rocky outcrop on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a horseback rider on the trail ahead, passing them as the landscape transitions toward denser pine forest. Rocky formations appear on the right while the river remains visible in the distance to the left, and the trail continues into the wooded area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transitions from an open, river-side wilderness into a dense pine forest. It begins with the character walking past a large rock cliff formation and grassy meadows, with a river flowing closely to the left under the bright midday sun. As the path curves, the scene opens into expansive grasslands where the river recedes into the distance and scattered boulders dot the terrain. The camera then follows the trail toward a horseback rider, passing them as the landscape shifts from open fields to a more enclosed environment. Finally, the view moves toward a wooded area where rocky formations emerge on the right and the trail disappears into a thick stand of pine trees.
